active_projects.completion_summary: Implemented cross-oracle differential testing infrastructure: self-contained primitive formula enumerator (atom/bot/imp/box/untl/snce up to complexity N), known-formula baselines with 20+ tautologies and 20+ invalid formulas, BimodalHarness conditional integration testing temporal-only formula agreement with documented edge cases (untl(bot,bot) and untl(A,A) MC oracle limitations), JSON differential report generator, and GitHub Actions CI workflow. 51 non-slow tests pass across 8 test classes.

active_projects.completion_summary: Created test_soundness_regression.py with 22 passing tests (+ 1 xfailed) across 5 test classes: TestBoundaryVacuity (6 tests documenting G(G(p)) and F(G(p)) spurious theorems at M=2), TestShiftClosure (2 tests, M=3 shift closure xfailed), TestGuardedCompositionality (6 tests validating frame axioms on serialized task_relation), TestStateIsolationRegression (4 tests with 100+ calls mixing propositional/depth-1/depth-2 formulas), TestKnownBoundaryUnsafe (5 tests with documented boundary mechanisms).
